meaning: adj.顺时针方向的adv.顺时针方向地
examples: She walked clockwise around the circle.
He told the children to start moving clockwise around the room.
Once the container is full, it stays shut until you turn it clockwise.
Oil that had been drifting toward Florida has been essentially sequestered in a counter-clockwise eddy.
The counter-clockwise direction of American tracks favoured Mr Antley's natural preference for his left hand.
